features: Practical Styling Comb: As a professional hairdressing tool, the professional salon comb can help you create a variety of unique hairstyles and make you more attractive. It is an essential hairdressing tool for ladies and barbers.

Handle Design: The handle of the rat tail comb is designed in a mouse-tail shape, which is not only convenient to hold, but also helps you to separate, comb and divide your hair accurately. Easily create beautiful hairstyles for you.

Widely Applicable: The stainless steel pintail comb has good compatibility and can be widely used for curly or straight hair of different lengths. Can be used for children, ladies, men, and stylists, etc.

Durable Material: The pin tail comb is made of PP plastic, which has high hardness and is not easy to break or deform. The handle is made of stainless steel, which has good rust and corrosion resistance.

The Package Includes: The package includes 12 black hair parting comb, the size of the product is 23*2.8cm. Enough quantity allows you to replace old or damaged combs, and you can also share them with your family or friends.
description: Product description Product Description Features: Easy to Hold: The weight of the metal pin tail comb is 120g, the size is 23*2.8cm, and it is ergonomically designed. Lightweight, comfortable to hold, not easy to feel fatigue. Precision Teeth: The teeth of the pin tail combs professional are precise, and there is a standard spacing between each tooth. Not only can comb your hair quickly and effectively, but also make your scalp feel very comfortable. Specification: Quantity: 12PCS Color: Black Size: 23*2.8cm Material: PP + Stainless Steel Package Includes: 12 × Hair Tail Comb Directions Suitable for various hair types and lengths. Start combing from the ends and work up. Use for parting and sectioning hair.
